name: Thunderbranch
descs: When inflicting [Burst] Potency with Skill effects, Inflict 1 [Burst] Potency and +1 [Burst] Count on target.
When inflicting [Burst] Potency with Skill effects, Inflict <style="upgradeHighlight">2 [Burst] Potency</style> and +1 [Burst] Count on target.

When inflicting [Burst] Potency with Skill effects, Inflict <style="upgradeHighlight">3 [Burst] Potency</style> and +1 [Burst] Count on target.

<style="upgradeHighlight">If the Skill's Affinity was Gloom, inflict 3 [Burst] Potency and +2 [Burst] Count instead.</style>
